history_text: 38-year-old male with a 3-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently well-controlled (HbA1c 7.2%). Comorbidities include obesity. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 66.9 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin 1000mg twice daily, Insulin detemir 18 units nightly, Sitagliptin 100mg once daily. No known drug allergies. He denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
